name: Fulcrum
description: Slash commands and interactive cards for the Fulcrum CLI. Calls fulcrum verbs over a remote rexecd gRPC sidecar.

settings_schema.header: Fulcrum slash + interactive cards. Network coordinates (rexecd address) are set via the REXECD_ADDR environment variable on the Mattermost server process; only admin-tunable business knobs appear here.

settings.display_name: Default host id for /f tasks create
settings.help_text: Optional. When set, /f tasks create injects --host <DefaultHostID> if the slashing user does not pass --host explicitly. fulcrum CLI requires hostId in remote-only deployments (otherwise the server returns CREATE_FAILED — remote-only mode requires hostId). Leave blank to require every user to pass --host themselves.
